description: Elsewhere, after the earlier reveals on the quinjet, Bobbi Morse regains consciousness and finds herself in the clutches of Grant Ward and Kara. Kara expresses a desire for vengeance, but Ward insists on prolonging Bobbi's suffering. Their ominous conversation underscores that Bobbi's ordeal is just beginning.

transcript.line: You did good, baby. Fooled every one of them.
It was hard being away from you.
Why can't we kill her now?
Closure's about so much more than that. It's about digging in, doing the work. I'll show you what I mean. And then we'll kill her.
